# VB-CABLE Vendor Package

This directory contains the official VB-CABLE Windows driver package used by
the PipeMic NSIS installer.

- Source: https://download.vb-audio.com/Download_CABLE/VBCABLE_Driver_Pack45.zip
- Product page: https://www.vb-cable.com
- Vendor: VB-Audio
- Model: donationware

If VB-CABLE is useful to you, please consider supporting VB-Audio.
